body.purpose: General interface text and document content.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Used for floating overlays like dropdowns and modals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button used throughout the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 32px; border: 1px solid #0284c7; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0284c7; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action used for secondary tasks.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #64748b; padding: 10px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: #0f172a; }

narrative.overview: FilDOCS is designed as a high-integrity, modern productivity tool. Every element must feel grounded, precise, and reliable.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Primary accent color is used on ≤10% of any screen.

rules.name: The Border-over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Use 1px borders for structure; shadows only for floating overlays.

dos: Do use tabular-nums for all dates and quantities.
Do use stroke-width: 2.25px for all icons.
Do prioritize a dense, functional layout.
donts: Don't use rounded-3xl or oversized radii.
Don't use purple or pink accents.
Don't use vibe-coded soft shadows for separation.
